stages.concept:
# Unit 099: 간접 의문문 1 - 개념톡

👩‍🏫 선생님: 오늘은 **간접 의문문**에 대해 배워볼까요?

> I don't know **where he lives**.
> 나는 그가 어디에 사는지 모르겠다.

👩‍🏫 선생님: 간접 의문문은 의문문이 다른 문장의 **일부**로 들어간 것이에요. 이때 어순이 **평서문(주어 + 동사)** 순서로 바뀌어요!

👩‍🏫 선생님: 직접 → 간접:

> **Where does** he live? (직접 의문문)
> → I don't know **where he lives**. (간접 의문문 — 평서문 어순!)

> **What is** she doing? (직접)
> → Do you know **what she is doing**? (간접)

> **When did** they arrive? (직접)
> → Tell me **when they arrived**. (간접)

👩‍🏫 선생님: 의문사가 있는 간접 의문문: **의문사 + 주어 + 동사**

> I wonder **why he is late**.
> 나는 그가 왜 늦는지 궁금하다.

> Can you tell me **how I can get** to the station?
> 역에 어떻게 갈 수 있는지 알려주실 수 있나요?

**Q. 다음 두 문장을 한 문장으로 바르게 연결한 것을 고르세요.**
"Do you know?" + "Where is the post office?"
1. Do you know where is the post office?
2. Do you know where the post office is? ✅
3. Do you know the post office is where?

👩‍🏫 선생님: 맞아요! 간접 의문문은 원래 의문문의 동사가 뒤로 가서 [의문사 + 주어 + 동사] 순서인 `where the post office is`가 되어야 한답니다.

🧑‍🎓 학생: 간접 의문문은 의문사 + 주어 + 동사 순서! 직접 의문문의 도치가 풀리는 거군요.
stages.practiceA:
# Unit 099: 간접 의문문 1 - 연습문제 A

**01.** 밑줄 친 부분을 어법에 맞게 고치시오.
I don't know whether is he in the house.
> **정답** whether he is in the house

---

**02.** Do you know where does she live?
> **정답** where she lives

---

**03.** I wonder what is his name.
> **정답** what his name is

---

**04.** Can you tell me when does the train leave?
> **정답** when the train leaves

---

**05.** She asked who did break the window.
> **정답** who broke the window

---

**06.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
I don't know where does he live.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** does he live → he lives

---

**07.** Do you know what is she doing?
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** is she doing → she is doing

---

**08.** I wonder how old is he.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** is he → he is

---

**09.** Can you tell me where is the library?
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** is the library → the library is

---

**10.** She asked what did I eat for lunch.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** did I eat → I ate

---

**11.** 우리말에 맞게 빈칸에 알맞은 말을 쓰시오.
나는 그가 어디에 사는지 모른다.
I don't know he .
> **정답** where, lives

---

**12.** 그녀가 몇 살인지 아니?
Do you know she (     )
> **정답** how old, is

---

**13.** 나는 그가 누구인지 궁금하다.
I wonder he .
> **정답** who, is

---

**14.** 버스가 언제 오는지 알려 주세요.
Please tell me the bus .
> **정답** when, comes

---

**15.** 그녀가 무엇을 좋아하는지 모르겠다.
I don't know she .
> **정답** what, likes

---

**16.** 우리말에 맞게 다음 단어들을 바르게 배열하시오.
나는 그가 어디에 있는지 모른다.
don't I know where is he
> **정답** I / don't / know / where / he / is

---

**17.** 그녀가 무엇을 원하는지 아니?
Do know you what she wants
> **정답** Do / you / know / what / she / wants

---

**18.** 나는 그가 왜 늦었는지 궁금하다.
wonder I why he was late
> **정답** I / wonder / why / he / was / late

---

**19.** 도서관이 어디에 있는지 알려 주세요.
Please me tell where the library is
> **정답** Please / tell / me / where / the / library / is

---

**20.** 나는 그녀가 언제 올지 모르겠다.
I don't when know she will come
> **정답** I / don't / know / when / she / will / come
stages.practiceB:
# Unit 099: 간접 의문문 1 - 연습문제 B

**01.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오. [2개]
I don't know _______ he leaves for Italy.
whether
if
what
how
> **정답** if, whether

---

**02.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
Does she know _______ that girl is?
if
who
whether
that
> **정답** who

---

**03.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
Can you tell me _______________?
what he likes
what did he like
what does he like
if he like
> **정답** what he likes

---

**04.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말로 적절하지 않은 것을 고르시오.
Do you know ________________?
how old she is
why the girl is crying
When does he come back
what day it is today
> **정답** When does he come back

---

**05.** 다음 두 문장을 하나의 간접의문문으로 바꿀 때 빈칸에
들어갈 말을 고르시오.
I wonder. + Did you finish it?
→ I wonder _________________________ it.
if you finished
that you finished
if did you finish
if you finish
> **정답** if you finished

---

**06.** 다음 대화의 빈칸에 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
A: What are you doing?
B: I'm looking up a dictionary. I wonder
_______________.
whether what this word means
what this word means
if this word means
what does this word mean
> **정답** what this word means

---

**07.** 다음 두 문장을 하나의 간접의문문으로 바꿀 때 빈칸에
들어갈 말을 고르시오.
Do you know? + Why was he absent from school?
→ Do you know _______________________ absent
from school?
that why he was
that why was he
why was he
why he was
> **정답** why he was

---

**08.** 다음 두 문장을 하나의 간접의문문으로 바르게 바꾼 것을
고르시오.
Do you know? + Who is he?
Do you know that is he?
Do you know that who he is?
Do you know who he is?
Do you know who is he?
> **정답** Do you know who he is?

---

**09.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 문장을 고르시오.
Do you know where is he from?
Do you know whether he can do magic?
I couldn't ask her if he was sick.
Does he know where I met her?
> **정답** Do you know where is he from?

---

**10.** 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 모두 고르시오. (2개)
Can you tell me where does he work?
I'm not sure if they're soccer players.
I know who is she.
Tell me if you told someone that fact.
> **정답** I know who is she., Can you tell me where does he
work?

---

**11.** 다음 중 어법상 맞는 문장을 고르시오. [2개]
Do you know what grade is she?
I wonder why he got the job.
Do you know how he grew that flower?
Can you tell me why are you crying?
> **정답** I wonder why he got the job., Do you know how he
grew that flower?

---

**12.** 다음 중 어법상 어색한 것을 고르시오.
I can't tell you if she likes him.
She wonders if I will help her
She wonders if he can pass the test.
I'm not sure what does she do.
> **정답** I'm not sure what does she do.

---

**13.** 다음 빈칸에 공통으로 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
_______ he will come to the party is not sure.
I wonder _______ the tree will bear fruit.
What(what)
That(that)
Whether(whether)
If(if)
> **정답** Whether(whether)

---

**14.** 다음 빈칸에 공통으로 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
Tom doesn't know _______ tall she is.
Amy wonders _______ much the computer is.
what
if
where
how
> **정답** how

---

**15.** 주어진 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
너는 그녀가 어느 아이돌 그룹을 좋아하는지 아니?
Which boy do you know band she likes?
Do you know which boy does band she like?
Which do you know which boy band she likes?
Do you know which boy band she likes?
> **정답** Do you know which boy band she likes?

---

**16.** 주어진 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
여기에서 그 공항까지 얼마나 먼지 알고 있니?
Do you know how far is it from here to the
airport?
Do you know from here to the airport how far?
Do you know how far from here to the airport
is?
Do you know how far it is from here to the
airport?
> **정답** Do you know how far it is from here to the airport?

---

**17.** 주어진 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
가장 잘 팔린 책이 무엇인지 알려줄 수 있나요?
Can you tell me what the best selling book is?
What can you tell me what the best selling
book?
What can you tell me what the best selling
book is?
Can you tell me what is the best selling book?
> **정답** Can you tell me what the best selling book is?

---

**18.** 다음 문장에서 틀린 부분을 찾아 완전한 문장으로 바르게
쓰시오.
Let me know where stay they.
> **정답** Let me know where they stay.

---

**19.** 다음 문장에서 틀린 부분을 찾아 완전한 문장으로 바르게
쓰시오.
I wonder whether will you be free tomorrow.
> **정답** I wonder whether you will be free tomorrow.

---

**20.** 밑줄 친 부분 중 어법상 틀린 것을 골라 고쳐 쓰시오.
I walked down the street. Flowers were blooming
on the side of the road. I wondered what these
flowers were. I took a picture of them and
searched them. So I know what are they now.
틀린곳 → 정답
> **정답** what are they, what they are
stages.descriptive:
# Unit 099 간접 의문문 1중1 (중등) - 서술형문제

**01.** 우리말을 영작할 때 알맞은 단어를 선택하여 문장을
완성하시오.
힌트 (     ) where, is, if
너는 빵가게가 어디 있는지 아니?
Do you know  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     ) (     )
정답 where, the, bakery, is

---

**02.** 우리말을 영작할 때 알맞은 단어를 선택하여 문장을
완성하시오.
힌트 (     ) which, did, took, whether
Teddy가 어느 버스를 탔는지 말해줄 수 있니?
Can you tell me  (     )  bus Teddy  (     ) (     )
정답 which, took

---

**03.** 우리말을 영작할 때 알맞은 단어를 선택하여 문장을
완성하시오.
힌트 (     ) if, does, is, what
나는 이 책이 재미있는지 궁금하다.
I wonder  (     )  this book  (     )  interesting.
정답 if, is

---

**04.** 우리말에 맞게 주어진 표현을 이용하여 문장을
완성하시오.
그녀가 2년 전에 어디에서 살았는지 나에게 말해줘. [live]
Tell me  (     )   (     )   (     )  two years ago.
정답 where, she, lived

---

**05.** 우리말에 맞게 주어진 표현을 이용하여 문장을
완성하시오.
너는 그가 무엇을 말했는지 이해하니? [say]
Do you understand  (     )   (     )   (     ) (     )
정답 what, he, said

---

**06.** 우리말에 맞게 주어진 표현을 이용하여 문장을
완성하시오.
나는 누가 그것을 너에게 줬는지 궁금하다. [give]
I wonder  (     )   (     )  it to you.
정답 who, gave

---

**07.** 우리말에 맞게 주어진 표현을 이용하여 문장을
완성하시오.
Hanson은 그 영화가 상을 받을지 궁금하다. [if, win an
award]
Hanson wonders  (     )  the movie  (     )  
  (     ) .
정답 if, will, win, an, award

---

**08.** 우리말에 맞게 주어진 단어를 알맞게 배열하여 문장을
완성하시오.
그는 그 그림이 얼마인지 알까?
[the painting] [know] [Does]
[is?] [much] [he] [how]
정답 Does / he / know / how / much / the painting / is?

---

**09.** 우리말에 맞게 주어진 단어를 알맞게 배열하여 문장을
완성하시오.
너는 그녀가 몇 살인지 말해줄 수 있니?
[is?] [tell] [how old] [you]
[Can] [the girl] [me]
정답 Can / you / tell / me / how old / the girl / is?

---

**10.** 우리말에 맞게 주어진 단어를 알맞게 배열하여 문장을
완성하시오.
나는 그녀가 이 소설을 썼는지 확신할 수 없다.
[she] [sure] [this novel.]
[I'm] [wrote] [not]
[whether]
정답 I'm / not / sure / whether / she / wrote / this novel.

---
stages.practical:
# Unit 099: 간접 의문문 1 - 변형문제

**01.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오. [2개]
I don't know _______ he leaves for France. whether if what how
> 정답: if, whether

---

**02.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
Does she know _______ that boy is? if who whether that
> 정답: who

---

**03.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
Can you tell me _______________? what she wants what did she want what does she want if she want
> 정답: what she wants

---

**04.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말로 적절하지 않은 것을 고르시오.
Do you know ________________? how old he is why the boy is crying When does she come back what day it is today
> 정답: When does she come back

---

**05.** 다음 두 문장을 하나의 간접의문문으로 바꿀 때 빈칸에 들어갈 말을 고르시오.
I wonder. + Did you complete it? → I wonder _________________________ it. if you completed that you completed if did you complete if you complete
> 정답: if you completed

---

**06.** 다음 대화의 빈칸에 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
A: What are you doing?
B: I'm searching online.
I wonder _______________. whether what this phrase means what this phrase means if this phrase means what does this phrase mean
> 정답: what this phrase means

---

**07.** 다음 두 문장을 하나의 간접의문문으로 바꿀 때 빈칸에 들어갈 말을 고르시오.
Do you know? + Why was she absent from class? → Do you know _______________________ absent from class? that why she was that why was she why was she why she was
> 정답: why she was

---

**08.** 다음 두 문장을 하나의 간접의문문으로 바르게 바꾼 것을 고르시오.
Do you know? + Who is she?
Do you know that is she?
Do you know that who she is?
Do you know who she is?
Do you know who is she?
> 정답: Do you know who she is?

---

**09.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 문장을 고르시오.
Do you know where is she from?
Do you know whether he can do magic tricks?
I couldn't ask her if he was tired.
Does he know where I met her?
> 정답: Do you know where is she from?

---

**10.** 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 모두 고르시오.
(2개) Can you tell me where does she live?
I'm not sure if they're basketball players.
I know who is he.
Tell me if you told someone that story.
> 정답: I know who is he., Can you tell me where does she

---

**11.** 다음 중 어법상 맞는 문장을 고르시오. [2개]
Do you know what grade is he?
I wonder why she got the award.
Do you know how he grew that plant?
Can you tell me why are you laughing?
> 정답: I wonder why she got the award., Do you know how he

---

**12.** 다음 중 어법상 어색한 것을 고르시오.
I can't tell you if she likes him.
She wonders if I will help her.
She wonders if he can pass the quiz.
I'm not sure what does she study.
> 정답: I'm not sure what does she study.

---

**13.** 다음 빈칸에 공통으로 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
_______ he will come to the event is not sure.
I wonder _______ the plant will grow well.
What(what) That(that) Whether(whether) If(if)
> 정답: Whether(whether)

---

**14.** 다음 빈칸에 공통으로 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
Tom doesn't know _______ tall he is.
Amy wonders _______ much the phone costs. what if where how
> 정답: how

---

**15.** 주어진 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
너는 그가 어느 음악 그룹을 좋아하는지 아니?
Which music do you know group he likes?
Do you know which music does group he like?
Which do you know which music group he likes?
Do you know which music group he likes?
> 정답: Do you know which music group he likes?

---

**16.** 주어진 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
여기에서 그 역까지 얼마나 먼지 알고 있니?
Do you know how far is it from here to the station?
Do you know from here to the station how far?
Do you know how far from here to the station is?
Do you know how far it is from here to the station?
> 정답: Do you know how far it is from here to the station?

---

**17.** 주어진 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
가장 인기 있는 노래가 무엇인지 알려줄 수 있나요?
Can you tell me what the most popular song is?
What can you tell me what the most popular song?
What can you tell me what the most popular song is?
Can you tell me what is the most popular song?
> 정답: Can you tell me what the most popular song is?

---

**18.** 다음 문장에서 틀린 부분을 찾아 완전한 문장으로 바르게 쓰시오.
Let me know where live they.
> 정답: Let me know where they live.

---

**19.** 다음 문장에서 틀린 부분을 찾아 완전한 문장으로 바르게 쓰시오.
I wonder whether will she be free this weekend.
> 정답: I wonder whether she will be free this weekend.

---

**20.** 밑줄 친 부분 중 어법상 틀린 것을 골라 고쳐 쓰시오.
